titleZh: 新《公司法》下有限责任公司股权转让模式研究
titleEn: Equity Transfer Modes in Limited Liability Companies under the New Company Law
abstractZh: 比较新修订规则下有限责任公司股权转移模式及其对治理结构和股权归属稳定性的影响。
abstractEn: Studies transfer mechanisms for LLC equity after the 2023 revisions and implications for capital structures, shareholder status, and transfer risk.
